ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the track belongs to */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the track was released */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number on the album */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code to uniquely identify the track */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the track contains explicit content */,
  "lyrics_available" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if lyrics are available for the track */,
  "lyrics_url" TEXT /* URL to the lyrics of the track */,
  "album_type" TEXT /* Type of the album (e.g., single, album, compilation) */,
  "track_type" TEXT /* Type of the track (e.g., original, remix, live) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "score" REAL /* Average score of the album */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the album was released */,
  "label" TEXT /* Name of the record label that produced the album */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album's cover art */,
  "is_compilation" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the album is a compilation */,
  "upc" TEXT /* Universal Product Code to uniquely identify the album */,
  "copyright_text" TEXT /* Copyright text for the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's image */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has on the platform */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile on the platform */,
  "social_media_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's social media profile */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the artist's profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the artist's profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Measure of how suitable a track is for dancing */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy level of the track */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the track (e.g., G#, C#) */,
  "key_val" INTEGER /* Key value of the track (0-11, corresponding to musical notes) */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track in decibels */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (0 for minor, 1 for major) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track (positivity or negativity) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in beats per minute */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "key_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the key detection */,
  "mode_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the mode detection */,
  "tempo_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the tempo detection */,
  "time_signature_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the time signature detection */,
  "duration_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the duration detection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track being engaged with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the track */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., play, like, share) */,
  "engagement_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user engaged with the track */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for engagement (e.g., mobile, desktop, tablet) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the engagement occurred */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the user's session during the engagement */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the engagement in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)
